summary: Iteration 47: Phase A Frontend Pages - All 9 features verified. Backend: 19/19 tests pass. Frontend: All pages load correctly with full CRUD functionality.

1_pricing_page_public.details: Pricing page loads at /pricing with 3 plan tiers (Starter/Free, Growth/$99, Enterprise/$249), FAQ section, header with Login + Support links, 'Most Popular' badge on Growth plan

2_services_page_admin.details: Services page loads after login, can create new service plan with title+date+type, expand/collapse plans work, add items (songs/prayers/sermons) to plans

3_households_page_admin.details: Households page loads, can create new household with name and address, search households works, expand/collapse household cards work

4_volunteers_page_admin.details: Volunteers page loads with Teams and Schedule tabs, can create volunteer team with name/ministry/description, can add schedule entry with date/role/volunteer name

5_portal_directory.details: Portal directory page loads after login, shows member directory with search, member cards with names/status badges

6_settings_branding.details: Settings page Appearance tab loads branding form (app name, tagline, primary color, logo URL, description) from API, can save branding, shows live preview

7_nav_ministry_section.details: Sidebar shows Services and Volunteers under MINISTRY section

9_landing_pricing_link.details: Landing page header has Pricing link that navigates to /pricing

critical_code_review_comments: All Phase A pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Services page correctly implements expand/collapse with items management
Households page has search and address management
Volunteers page has both Teams and Schedule tabs with full CRUD
Portal Directory respects privacy settings (share_email, share_phone, directory_visible)
Branding settings have live preview and persist correctly
Navigation structure is correct with Services and Volunteers under MINISTRY
seed_data_creation: Created test service plans, households, volunteer teams, and schedule entries during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 47 verified all Phase A frontend pages: Pricing (public), Services (admin), Households (admin), Volunteers (admin), Portal Directory (portal), and Settings/Branding (admin). All backend APIs work correctly with proper authentication. The welcome modal ('Welcome, Shannon!') appears on first login and can be dismissed with 'I'll figure it out myself' button. Services and Volunteers are in the MINISTRY section of the sidebar. Directory is in the portal navigation.
